name: chow-new
description: Concise bilingual news article summarizer with German and English (DE/EN) support. No external dependencies, comprehensive error handling. Cleanest ClawHub submission reviewed.
review: Cleanest ClawHub submission reviewed. Bilingual DE/EN support with no external dependencies and comprehensive error handling. Minor frontmatter cosmetic issues only. Excellent bilingual UX for German-speaking audiences.

drax_results.notes: No external deps. DE/EN modes confirmed.
